## Add a Project to the Gallery

Thanks for sharing your project with the Moco Code & Coffee community!

### Checklist

- [ ] I've added my project entry to `_data/projects.yml`
- [ ] My entry includes all required fields (`name`, `author`, `description`)
- [ ] If I included an image, I've added the file to `assets/img/projects/`
- [ ] My description is a short, clear sentence or two about what the project does

### My project entry

```yaml
- name: 
  author: 
  description: 
  link: ""         # optional — URL to the project or repo
  image:           # optional — /assets/img/projects/yourfile.png or a URL
```

### Anything else to share?

<!-- Any context about the project you'd like reviewers to know -->
